escalatedRisks.risk: 🆕 WSTS semiconductor market $1.51T (+90% YoY) — largest single upward revision in history

Implications: the structural demand thesis for DDR5 and enterprise SSD is now backed by the most authoritative industry forecast body. All previous 'wait' strategies are invalidated by this scale of demand projection.

Long-term positive for supply but 2-3 year construction timeline means NO relief for 2026-2027 procurement. Short-term: signal confirms extreme demand expectations.

escalatedRisks.status: NEW — May 30 2026. Newegg new SKU $29,950 (+9.8% vs previous band $24,600-$27,265). Low-end seller inventory potentially depleting, triggering high-price seller entry.
escalatedRisks.detail: Newegg listing for D5-P5336 61.44TB U.2 at $29,950 appeared, pushing Newegg-side pricing band upward by $2,685 (+9.8%). Lower-price listings ($24,600-$27,265) still visible but the appearance of a new high-price seller suggests low-end inventory may be thinning. Combined with Mouser Day 11 (1 unit only), the QLC 61.44TB supply landscape shows premium tier expanding while low-cost tier contracting. Channel stratification intensifying.
escalatedRisks.confidence: medium-high (single new listing, needs persistence verification)
